name: Wooden Shapes & Animals Puzzles - 2pc - Gigglescape™: Educational Toddler Puzzle Set, Fine Motor Skills, Ages 2+
description:
Activate your little one's fine motor and problem solving skills during playtime with the Wooden Shapes & Animals Puzzles from Gigglescape™. Made from wood, this set includes 10 animal pieces and eight shape pieces that fit into place on two wooden puzzle boards. Each piece features illustrations hidden beneath to create fun moments with shapes, colors and animals.

Gigglescape™: Where play starts and discovery never ends.
